prompt: Create a photorealistic portrait of an adult East Asian woman with short light-brown bob hair with wispy bangs, standing indoors at night beside large floor-to-ceiling apartment windows overlooking blurred city lights. She faces the camera with a gentle confident smile, soft eye contact, and a relaxed fashion-model pose, one hand lightly touching the shoulder strap area and the other holding the edge of an oversized chunky knit cardigan. She wears a white asymmetrical one-piece cutout swimsuit with oval torso openings and high-cut sides layered under a loose cream cable-knit cardigan slipping off the shoulders. The composition is a vertical three-quarter body portrait from head to upper thighs, centered subject, natural skin texture, glossy eyes, subtle makeup, warm indoor lighting, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh city lights outside the dark windows, modern apartment interior with a pale window ledge and a beige lounge chair in the background. Use a high-end editorial photography style, realistic anatomy, tasteful glamour, warm color grading, 50mm lens look, soft shadows, crisp focus on the face and outfit, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
